metadata.description: Free-form metadata. For consent certificates, GoodAudit expects fields like consent_text, page_url, time_on_page_seconds, and geo (city/region/country).

recording_session_id.description: Links this entry to a session recording

session_token.description: Short-lived srt_-prefixed token for browser-direct authentication on events and complete endpoints

info.description:
GoodAudit API documentation.

## Authentication
Most API endpoints require authentication using API keys.

### API Key Types
- **Public Keys** (`pk_...`): Read-only access
- **Private Keys** (`sk_...`): Full read/write access

### How to Authenticate
1. Log in to your account and create an API key
2. Click the "Authorize" button in Swagger UI
3. Enter your API key: `Bearer <your_api_key>`

All authenticated requests must include the `Authorization` header.

Public tokenized artifact URLs, such as signed session replay URLs, are exceptions.

### Multi-tenant Access
API keys are scoped to your membership in a specific account.
To access multiple accounts, create separate API keys for each.
info.title: GoodAudit API

post.summary: Validate recent actions for framework strict-mode readiness

parameters.description: Cursor for backward pagination. Returns entries with sequence_number < value. Mutually exclusive with after_sequence.
parameters.name: before_sequence

parameters.description: Sort order by sequence_number. Defaults to asc.
parameters.name: order

parameters.description: JSON object for extensions containment filtering
parameters.name: extensions

parameters.description: Taxonomy category filter in framework:pattern format (e.g. hipaa:access.*)
parameters.name: category

get.summary: Get a single audit log entry

post.description: Creates a short-lived public certificate URL for a consent audit log entry. This endpoint requires a private sk_ API key.

get.description: Fetches raw rrweb event JSON using a signed playback URL. This endpoint is public and the token in the URL is the credential.

post.summary: Stream rrweb events to a session

post.description: Creates a short-lived public replay URL for a completed session recording. This endpoint requires a private sk_ API key.

get.summary: Get taxonomy tree for a framework
